title: dryopteris resinosofoetida
intro: Dryopteris resinosofoetida, also known as the resinous scaly male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The resinous scaly male fern can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
